name: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Suspicious ICMP Type Code
notes: This Building Block identifies ICMP flows with suspicious ICMP type codes.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Suspicious ICMP Type Code on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP
when the flow context is Local to Local
when the ICMP type is any of Echo Reply, Echo, Destination Unreachable, Time Exceeded
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Suspicious ICMP Type Code on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP
AND NOT when the flow context is Local to Local
AND NOT when the ICMP type is any of Echo Reply, Echo, Destination Unreachable, Time Exceeded
